description: Full-width paginated data table with sortable columns. Click a row to open a slide-in detail drawer for editing.

css_layout_rules..layout-tradelines-v2: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 260px 1fr 0px; min-height: 100vh; transition: grid-template-columns 300ms ease;
css_layout_rules..table-header: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
css_layout_rules..table-filters: display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
css_layout_rules..data-table-wrapper: overflow-x: auto; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border);
css_layout_rules..detail-drawer: border-left: 1px solid var(--border); overflow-y: auto; overflow: hidden; transition: all 300ms ease;
